Package neqsim.process.operations

Class ControllerTuningResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.ControllerTuningResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ControllerTuningResult extends Object implements Serializable
Quantitative result from a controller tuning or performance screening study.

The metrics are calculated from time, process-value, and controller-output histories and can be used with existing NeqSim controllers, measurement devices, or imported tagreader data.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ControllerTuningResult

      ControllerTuningResult(String controllerName, double setPoint, double meanAbsoluteError, double maxAbsoluteError, double integralAbsoluteError, double integralSquaredError, double overshootPercent, double settlingTimeSeconds, double outputSaturationFraction, boolean stableAtEnd, String recommendation)
      Creates a controller tuning result.
      Parameters:
      controllerName - controller name
      setPoint - controller set point
      meanAbsoluteError - mean absolute control error
      maxAbsoluteError - maximum absolute control error
      integralAbsoluteError - integral absolute error
      integralSquaredError - integral squared error
      overshootPercent - overshoot as percent of step magnitude
      settlingTimeSeconds - settling time in seconds, or NaN if not settled
      outputSaturationFraction - fraction of samples at output limits
      stableAtEnd - true if the final response is within tolerance with low variation
      recommendation - short tuning recommendation

    • getControllerName

      Returns the controller name.

      public double getOvershootPercent()
      Returns overshoot as percent of step magnitude.
      Returns:

    • getSettlingTimeSeconds

      public double getSettlingTimeSeconds()
      Returns the settling time.
      Returns:
      settling time in seconds, or NaN if not settled

    • getOutputSaturationFraction

      public double getOutputSaturationFraction()
      Returns the output saturation fraction.
      Returns:
      fraction of samples at output limits from 0 to 1

    • isStableAtEnd

      public boolean isStableAtEnd()
      Checks whether the final response is stable by the study tolerance.
      Returns:
      true when stable at the end of the data window

    • getRecommendation

      public String getRecommendation()
      Returns a short tuning recommendation.
      Returns:
      recommendation text

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes the metrics to formatted JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON result
